# PERF-063 positive: binding.Validator.Engine() invoked inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-063-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin/binding"
)

func ValidateInHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	engine := binding.Validator.Engine()
	_ = engine
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
